overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in wizard robes exploring a cozy, rustic cottage interior with exposed wooden beams, a stone fireplace, and period furnishings. The character moves continuously through connected living spaces including a dining area and bedroom quarters.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cottage entryway, observing the wall-mounted broom rack and vanity mirror

entered.detail: wall-mounted wooden rack holding three brooms with straw bristles
tall wooden-framed oval mirror reflecting the room interior
dark wood dresser with multiple drawers and decorative items on top
small framed artwork hanging on the plaster wall above the dresser

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cottage entryway with exposed wooden beams overhead. The character stands near a wall-mounted broom rack and an oval mirror, with a wooden dresser visible to the right. The space is dimly lit with warm, mixed lighting as the character begins to explore.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living area with stone fireplace and dining table

events.description: moving from narrow entry hallway into open living space with large stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: circling around the stone fireplace and approaching the round dining table near the windows

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with wooden mantel and cooking pots hanging inside
stack of chopped firewood beside the fireplace hearth
oval-framed portrait of a woman hanging on the wall near the fireplace
round wooden dining table set with plates and candle holders
wooden dining chairs with curved backs arranged around the table
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main living area featuring a prominent stone fireplace with a wooden mantel. The space opens up to reveal a round dining table with chairs near bright windows, and a tall wooden cabinet in the background. Natural light filters through the windows, illuminating the exposed ceiling beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: sleeping quarters with loft above and sitting area

events.description: entering the bedroom area with single bed and wardrobe becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking past the upholstered armchair and examining the bed and wall portraits in the sleeping area

entered.detail: tufted upholstered armchair with wooden frame near the windows
tall wooden wardrobe cabinet with carved details
single bed with floral patterned bedding and white pillow
large rectangular portrait of a man in formal attire hanging on the wall
wall-mounted hooks holding folded cloths and a blue hat
dark wooden door with iron hinges at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the sleeping quarters of the cottage, featuring a single bed with floral bedding, a large wooden wardrobe, and an upholstered armchair. The character moves through the space past large portraits hanging on the walls, approaching a wooden door at the far end. A loft area with a railing is visible overhead, and wall hooks with hanging cloths appear near the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic cottage, transitioning from a dim, narrow entryway into expansive, light-filled living and sleeping quarters. It begins in a confined hallway beneath exposed wooden beams, passing a wall-mounted broom rack and an oval mirror in warm, mixed lighting. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a main living area where natural light filters through bright windows, illuminating a stone fireplace and a round dining table. The scene then shifts into the sleeping quarters, gliding past floral bedding and large wall portraits toward a wooden door. Finally, the camera reveals a loft area with a railing overhead and wall hooks with hanging cloths as it approaches the exit.
